scripts.android:setup: cd frontend && npx cap init "TREDO Cockpit" "com.tredo.cockpit"
scripts.android:add: npm run web:build && cd frontend && npx cap add android
scripts.android:build: npm run web:build && cd frontend && npx cap sync
scripts.android:open: cd frontend && npx cap open android
scripts.desktop:build:ubuntu: npm run web:build && cd frontend && npm run desktop:build:linux
scripts.desktop:build:mac-m1: npm run web:build && cd frontend && npm run desktop:build:mac
scripts.check: turbo run lint && cargo check --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml
